rulings.Case Title: MAUREEN KEATING VS. JOANNE DAKE, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS ADMINISTRATOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Adna Dditional Documents In Regards To Defts Responses
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 17, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF MAUREEN KEATING's Motion To Compel Further Responses To additional Documents In Regards To Defendants Responses. Deny. Supplemental responses including documents produced. RFP 4 and 5 Vague & Invasive, not calculated to lead to discovery of admissible evidence. Deny sanctions. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRETT STAFFORD et al VS. KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Class Certification ; Docs Referenced By Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 17, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF BRETT STAFFORD, KOICHI MATSUDA and BARBARA BRADSHAW's Motion For Class Certification. Deny. Class as to 5th cause of action overbroad and not within definition. Also 2nd sub class related to 5th cause of action only. Class as to the 2nd cause of action deny because certification of class would not be predominant as to the 6 causes of action in complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHIK WAN JUNG VS. ASUNCIO CAUICH-CHAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 17, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT ANGELA ROBERTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny 5 days to answer see overrule nationale. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHIK WAN JUNG VS. ASUNCIO CAUICH-CHAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 17, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT ANGELA ROBERTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule. 5 days to answer, verification by agent is proper and ownership issue of fact not on face of complaint. =(501/REQ)
